llm_context.content: Imagine you are helping software test engineers to create comprehensive test plans without delving i...

actionUnits.condition: Activate GvrPointerInputModule (MonoBehaviour id: 986, Script GUID: fcd4baceb58cc40c98e500572bede6a6, vrModeOnly: 0). Expected: ShouldActivateModule returns true when vrModeOnly=0; if GvrPointerManager.Pointer != null and active, pointer.OnInputModuleEnabled() will be invoked.

Run one frame of input processing on GvrPointerInputModule (MonoBehaviour id: 986, Script GUID: fcd4baceb58cc40c98e500572bede6a6). Assumes a GvrBasePointer is assigned (GvrPointerManager.Pointer != null) and its PointerTransform is active to allow CastRay(), UpdateCurrentObject(), UpdateReticle() and potential hover dispatch (GvrExecuteEventsExtension.pointerHoverHandler).

Deactivate GvrPointerInputModule (MonoBehaviour id: 986, Script GUID: fcd4baceb58cc40c98e500572bede6a6). Expected: DisablePointer(), HandlePendingClick(), HandlePointerExitAndEnter(pointerData, null), eventSystem.SetSelectedGameObject(null, ...), and pointer.OnInputModuleDisabled() invoked if a pointer is present.
